caption: A man with light-colored hair and a navy shirt is shown in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower-left corner of a football game broadcast. He is sitting in front of a decorated Christmas tree. On the main screen, several football players are on a green grass field. Some players wear white jerseys with black numbers, while others wear all-black uniforms. A player in a white jersey with the number 58 is standing on the right side of the field. On-screen graphics at the top show "1st & 10", a score of "14" and "7", "3rd", "2:30", and ":30". Text below the score reads "HOLD THE LINE ENABLED! AWAY TEAM HAS IMPROVED DRIVE". As the sequence progresses, the players shift positions; a player in a white jersey and a player in black move toward each other in the center, and the man in the small window changes his facial expression.
